likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte Velha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih VEH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Old Bridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Old Bridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih VEH-lyuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Ponte Velha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the windsurf schools are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as escolas de windsurf nesta zona?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FI-kang ahz-es-KO-lahs djee WIN-dsoorf NES-tah ZO-nah
phrases.cultural_note: Local directions frequently reference natural landmarks rather than street names.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, ficam perto da Lagoa de Óbidos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng PEHR-too DUH luh-GOHUH DIH AW-bee-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are near Lagoa de Óbidos.

responses.english: Good morning, they are near Lagoa de Óbidos.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng PEHR-too DUH luh-GOHUH DIH AW-bee-doosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, ficam perto da Lagoa de Óbidos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the windsurf schools are
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho para as escolas de windsurf?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh UHSH SHKOH-luhsh DIH weend-SOO-ruhf?
phrases.cultural_note: Local instructors often gather near natural harbors for safety and wind conditions.

likely_response.local: Pela marginal, junto ao Cais da Lagoa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEH-luh muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL, ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH DUH luh-GOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the waterfront road to the pier.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the waterfront road to the pier.
responses.phonetic: PEH-luh muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL, ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH DUH luh-GOHUH.
responses.french: Pela marginal, junto ao Cais da Lagoa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the birdwatching hide entry is
phrases.text_local: Como chego à entrada do esconderijo de observação de aves?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO shkoong-dih-REE-zhoo DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DIH AH-vihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Wildlife observation areas require quiet and strict adherence to marked paths.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga os sinais brancos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH BRAHNNG-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the white signs.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the white signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH BRAHNNG-koosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga os sinais brancos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the surf school rental desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a bancada de aluguer de surf?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh POH-soo en-kon-TRAHR uh-ban-KAH-duh duh-ah-loo-GEHR duh SOORF?
phrases.cultural_note: Equipment rentals are typically seasonal and operate directly on the sand.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto à Praia do Rei.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH PREYEUH DOO RAY.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to Praia do Rei.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to Praia do Rei.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH PREYEUH DOO RAY.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto à Praia do Rei.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the old bridge is
phrases.cultural_note: A Ponte Velha é uma ponte histórica que liga as margens da lagoa, localizada no centro histórico de Óbidos.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte Velha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih VEH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Old Bridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Old Bridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih VEH-lyuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Ponte Velha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the windsurf schools are
phrases.text_local: Sabe onde posso encontrar escolas de windsurf?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bih OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR SHKOH-luhsh DIH weend-SOO-ruhf?
phrases.cultural_note: A Lagoa de Óbidos é o local central para desportos náuticos, incluindo windsurf.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Lagoa de Óbidos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH luh-GOHUH DIH AW-bee-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at Lagoa de Óbidos.

responses.english: Good morning, at Lagoa de Óbidos.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH luh-GOHUH DIH AW-bee-doosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Lagoa de Óbidos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the campsite reception is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a receção do parque de campismo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH reh-sih-SOWN DOO PAH-ruh-kih DIH kahnm-PEEZH-moo?
phrases.cultural_note: Campsite facilities are usually centralized near the primary access gates.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a receção.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH reh-sih-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the reception.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the reception.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH reh-sih-SOWN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a receção.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a entrada para o hide de observação de aves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH ayngt-RAH-duh PUH-ruh AW EE-dih DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DIH AH-vihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a zona de observação de aves ou pergunte ao guia de aves no local.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DIH AH-vihsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DIH AH-vihsh NOO loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the birdwatching area or ask the bird guide on site.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the birdwatching area or ask the bird guide on site.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DIH AH-vihsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DIH AH-vihsh NOO loo-KAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a zona de observação de aves ou pergunte ao guia de aves no local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the windsurf schools are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as escolas de windsurf?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH SHKOH-luhsh DIH weend-SOO-ruhf?
phrases.cultural_note: As escolas de wind surf estão concentradas na lagoa, onde as condições são mais calmas e seguras para a prática.

likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH luh-GOHUH DIH AW-bee-doosh.
